summary: Defines deterministic semantic marker coverage evidence for compaction and replay quality. The harness supports direct marker-observation comparisons plus scan-based session message/entry views without live model calls or fuzzy LLM grading.
fail_closed_rules: critical markers missing after compaction or replay produce verdict fail
markers observed on the wrong branch or wrong turn produce verdict fail when critical
tool-output markers that require truncation receipts fail when the receipt is absent
scan reports fail when marker metadata changes, duplicate markers appear, unexpected markers appear, or false-positive controls are invented
unexpected marker IDs are reported and never satisfy missing expected markers
reports include marker digests or content fingerprints but do not serialize full marker payload text
non_goals: no replacement for Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, UBS, or repository quality gates
validation: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex_semantic/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex_semantic/tmp cargo test semantic_compaction_quality -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex_semantic/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex_semantic/tmp cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
